creator: antonio@triforce.info
text:
Created attachment 177676
mimedefang config.log file

I had deleted the mimedefang-2.78_2 port by accident by running make deinstall within /usr/ports and when I try to reinstall it using make reinstall I get the following error. No response from the port maintainer m.tsatsenko@gmail.com when I tried to contact him. E-mailed ports@freebsd.org which they replied stating that the port was broken and to submit a bug report here. Statement from ports@freebsd.org "Looking at the config log, you need MIME::WordDecoder and it is not in ports. Looks like someone needs to port and add it to the BUILD_DEPENDS. Until then, mimedefang is broken."
